推荐场景: 朋友见面｜复述昨天去过的地点
60秒任务: 「去了哪里」：过去事件时间线；A=重复确认后完成；B=猜测/乱确认翻车。
目标功能: 过去时｜事件顺序｜人物地点动作｜结果｜简单原因
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Where did you go yesterday?（询问地点）
I went to the station.（地点）
I went to a cafe with a friend.（同伴）
Did you go alone?（是否独自）
No, I went with ___.（同伴说明）
How did you get there?（交通方式）
I took the bus.（交通方式）
I walked because it was near.（原因）
I wanted to visit ___.（目的）
The place was crowded.（场所评价）
I stayed there for one hour.（停留时间）
Then I went home.（顺序）
I got lost for a few minutes.（小问题）
A staff member helped me.（解决）
It was a good trip.（总结）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: station, cafe, friend, bus, place, trip, staff, home, museum, street
Verbs: went, took, walked, visited, stayed, got lost, helped, wanted
Adjectives: near, far, crowded, good, alone
Time / Place: yesterday, there, for one hour, then, with a friend
Chunks: got there, went with, got lost, good trip, took the bus
